'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 36''' was the thirty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 4]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Flight from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]
*Freighter Trampers
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - The [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]
*Household Service [[Droid/Legends|Droids]]
*[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]] (AAT)
